---
title: "Ray Wang"
subtitle: "DATA SCIENTIST AT WALLICK COMMUNITIES"
image: sidebar/avatar.svg
image-alt: "Placeholder monogram avatar with the initials RW on a navy circle"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/   # TODO: replace with your LinkedIn URL
    - icon: github
      aria-label: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/        # TODO: replace with your GitHub URL
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      aria-label: Email
      href: mailto:you@example.com     # TODO: replace with your email
listing:
- id: blog
  contents:
    - "../blog/*/index.qmd"
    - "../blog/*/index.markdown"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: project
  contents:
    - "../project/*/index.qmd"
    - "../project/*/index.markdown"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/about.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/about.css
---

::: {#hero-heading}
<div class="h1">Hey, I'm Ray</div>

Thanks for stopping by!

I work as a data scientist at [Wallick Communities](https://www.wallick.com/), where I focus on reporting, analytics, and turning operational data into something useful for the rest of the business.

Outside of work I'm on an ongoing learning journey through Python, statistics, and modern data tooling. This site is where I write things down — partly so future-me can find them, and partly in case they help someone else.

Get in touch by [sending me a note](../contact.qmd)! {{< fa feather-pointed >}}

:::

## About me

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6 #about-me-1}

**Reports and analytics by day, Python learner by night.**

My day-to-day involves working with operational data — pulling it together, modeling it, and packaging it into reports and dashboards that help teams make decisions. I enjoy the slow craft of turning messy data into something legible.

<ul class="fa-ul">
   <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fa-solid fa-briefcase"></i></span>Data Scientist ∙ Wallick Communities</li>
</ul>

:::

::: {.g-col-6 #about-me-2}

I'm always picking up new tools and ideas — currently spending a lot of time with Python, SQL, and the wider data ecosystem. I write up the things I learn (and the things that stumped me) on the [blog](../blog/index.qmd), and the things I build show up in [projects](../project/index.qmd).

<ul class="fa-ul">
   <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i></span>Currently learning ∙ Python &amp; data science</li>
</ul>

:::

:::
<!-- end grid -->

## Lately ...

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
#### Blog
::: {#blog}
:::
[See all &rarr;](../blog/index.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
#### Projects
::: {#project}
:::
[See all &rarr;](../project/index.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::::
